title: 'Not helping them much': Trump downplays reports of Russia sharing intel with Iran
summary_full: Trump downplayed reports of Russia sharing intelligence with Iran to target US forces, stating it "is not helping them much" given recent events. He suggested that even if such sharing occurred, Iran has gained little, and dismissed concerns about US-Russia relations. Trump also indicated the US would not immediately tap its Strategic Petroleum Reserve to address rising oil prices.
